name: Collapsable Card
description: Card container that can expand or collapse to show or hide its content section. Used for grouping related form fields or information in multi-step or sectioned admin layouts.
constraints: Only 3 valid state+status combinations: Expanded+Active, Collapsed+Active, Inactive+Default.
Status=Default only exists with State=Inactive. Status=Active exists with Expanded and Collapsed.
Body and footer only render in Expanded+Active. Collapsed and Inactive show header only.
Header is fully rounded (all 4 corners 12px) in Collapsed state. Top-only rounding in Expanded and Inactive.
Shadow (Shadow/sm) applies to Collapsed+Active and Inactive+Default variants only.
showActionsFooter is only relevant when state=Expanded.

variants.description: Card is open. Header, body content slot, and optional footer are all visible.
Card is closed. Only the header is visible, fully rounded. Shadow indicates it is actionable.
Card is not yet actionable. Header text is muted, toggle icon is disabled. Shadow indicates separation.

state.description: Controls card visibility and interactability. Expanded shows full card; Collapsed shows header only; Inactive is not yet actionable.

status.description: Active applies accent styling. Default (paired with Inactive state) applies muted styling.

showActionsFooter.description: Shows the action footer with Cancel and Save buttons. Only relevant when state=Expanded.

body.note: 243px is the Figma placeholder height. Actual height is determined by content.

body.name: Body
body.note: Free content slot for form fields or any page content. Only renders in Expanded+Active.

footer.note: Only renders in Expanded+Active when showActionsFooter=true.

leadingActions.name: Leading actions
leadingActions.note: Empty by default — reserved for leading action buttons.

effects.note: Applied to Collapsed+Active and Inactive+Default variants only. Two layered drop shadows: rgba(16,24,40,0.06) offset(0,1) radius 2 + rgba(16,24,40,0.10) offset(0,1) radius 3.

do: Use to group related form fields or content that can be shown/hidden
Use Active status to indicate the currently focused card in a multi-card flow
Use Inactive state for cards that are not yet actionable in a sequential flow
dont: Don't nest collapsable cards inside each other
Don't use for content that should always be visible — use Section Card instead
Don't mix expanded and collapsed states without a clear visual hierarchy

aria: aria-controls (pointing to the body section id)
accessibility.keyboard: Enter or Space on the header toggles expand/collapse. Tab moves to interactive content within the body.
